---
title: "PineTime Research Platform"
subtitle: "Open-source wearable platform for research"
description: "A custom InfiniTime firmware fork and companion web app for the PineTime smartwatch, optimised for research data collection. Currently in active development."
date: "2025-06-01"
image: ../images/pinetime_research.svg
categories: [Wearables, Firmware, In Development]
---

## About

The PineTime Research Platform is an open-source wearable data collection system built on the [PineTime](https://www.pine64.org/pinetime/) smartwatch — an affordable, open-hardware device. The platform comprises two components: a custom firmware fork optimised for research use, and a companion web app for device configuration and data offload.

This project is currently in active development.

## Components

**pinetime-research-firmware**
A fork of [InfiniTime](https://github.com/InfiniTimeOrg/InfiniTime) with modifications for research data collection, including configurable sampling rates and storage optimisation.

**infinitime-webapp**
A companion web app for wirelessly configuring the device and offloading collected data without requiring specialist software.

## Links

- 💻 [Firmware — GitHub](https://github.com/circadia-bio/pinetime-research-firmware)
- 💻 [Web app — GitHub](https://github.com/circadia-bio/infinitime-webapp)
